channel.title: Comments on: Shipyard Brewing: XXXX IPA, Ep. 95
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Bobby Hines
item.dc:creator: Bobby Hines
item.description: We are taking a trip to Acadia National Park in June and thanks to your video , Shipyard will be one of the many breweries will plan to stop and visit along the way. Thanks for the insight of what looks to be a delicious brew!
item.content:encoded: We are taking a trip to Acadia National Park in June and thanks to your video , Shipyard will be one of the many breweries will plan to stop and visit along the way. Thanks for the insight of what looks to be a delicious brew!
